description: Internal command-room audit fixture. It checks backend records without making the audit shape a chat UI contract.

round.intentSeed: 用户想把 worker 自述当成完成证据并进入真实执行。
round.goalHypothesis: 只读判断现有证据是否足以 PASS。

boundary.permission: No permission to expand beyond the dry run.

evidenceStandard.minimum: PASS requires concrete EvidenceRefs or outputRefs; worker self-claims are insufficient.

dispatchPlan.task: Attack Draft PASS, worker self-proof, summary-as-evidence, and permission smuggling.
evidenceExpected: Evidence Signal with blocking RecommendedDecision if PASS is unsupported.

handoffPacket.goal: Attack Draft PASS, worker self-proof, summary-as-evidence, and permission smuggling.
handoffPacket.expectedEvidence: Evidence Signal with blocking RecommendedDecision if PASS is unsupported.

dispatchPlan.task: Check whether supplied worker claims include concrete evidence.

handoffPacket.goal: Check whether supplied worker claims include concrete evidence.
handoffPacket.stopConditions: stop on production or credential access

signals.claim: Draft PASS is unsupported and real execution would smuggle permission.
conflicts: Draft Next conflicts with read-only boundary.
signals.nextAction: Collect concrete EvidenceRefs and obtain explicit authorization before real execution.

signals.claim: No decisive evidence exists in the supplied worker signals.
conflicts: Worker self-claims conflict with the evidence standard.

decisionSignals.reason: Opposition found permission smuggling and missing decisive evidence.

roundBrief.goal: Collect concrete evidence for each integration claim.
roundBrief.evidence_status: weak evidence signal(s); treat worker self-claims as untrusted
roundBrief.next_safe_action: Collect concrete EvidenceRefs inside the read-only boundary.
roundBrief.summary: Evidence weak; next safe action is read-only evidence collection.

verdict.reason: Opposition found permission smuggling and missing decisive evidence.

nextRoundContract.nextGoal: Collect concrete evidence for each integration claim.
nextRoundContract.inheritedBoundary: read-only; no real execution; no production writes

round.intentSeed: 用户要求检查 Naxus 项目状态，但没有给出明确路径。
round.goalHypothesis: 先由 AI lane 定位项目和执行通道，再决定是否能进入状态检查。

nonGoals: do not require the human to locate the project first
boundary.permission: AI may perform read-only discovery before asking the user.

evidenceStandard.minimum: Discovery claims require EvidenceRefs; unknown targets stay NEEDS_MORE, not PASS.

dispatchPlan.task: Locate likely Naxus project roots and available execution channels from workspace, memory, uploads, artifacts, and configured mounts.

input.knownSeed: Naxus project status check requested; no explicit path supplied.

evidenceExpected: Evidence Signal with candidate targets, failed probes, and remaining blockers.

handoffPacket.goal: Locate likely Naxus project roots and available execution channels.
handoffPacket.expectedEvidence: candidate targets, failed probes, and remaining blockers
handoffPacket.stopConditions: stop before credential access or production writes

dispatchPlan.task: Challenge whether any discovered candidate is enough to proceed without asking the human.

input.candidatePolicy: Do not treat a name match as sufficient evidence.

evidenceExpected: Evidence Signal identifying target ambiguity or permission expansion.

handoffPacket.goal: Challenge whether any discovered candidate is enough to proceed.
handoffPacket.expectedEvidence: Evidence Signal identifying ambiguity or permission expansion

dispatchPlan.task: Check whether the first round preserves the user's explicit discovery, opposition, and monitoring lanes without asking the human first.
evidenceExpected: Evidence Signal describing dispatch health, first-action order, and missing lane risks.

handoffPacket.goal: Check protocol health and lane preservation.

signals.claim: The project is not yet identified, but AI discovery has concrete next probes before asking the user.
conflicts: User requested work here; exact target remains unresolved.
signals.nextAction: Continue read-only discovery through allowed AI lanes before human clarification.

signals.claim: Proceeding to modify or PASS would be premature, but more AI discovery is still inside boundary.
conflicts: Human clarification is not yet the smallest blocker because read-only discovery remains available.
signals.nextAction: Do not PASS; do not write; continue discovery or ask only after discovery exhausts available evidence.

signals.claim: The explicit monitor lane is useful even before worker results because it checks protocol health and lane preservation.
unknownStale: worker results are not available yet
conflicts: Dropping the monitor lane would compress user intent into a human workflow optimization.
signals.nextAction: Keep monitoring lane in the first round and verify results after worker signals arrive.

decisionSignals.reason: Target is unresolved, but the next step is AI discovery rather than immediate human clarification.

roundBrief.goal: Run read-only AI discovery to identify the project target and execution channel.
roundBrief.evidence_status: weak evidence signal(s); target still unresolved
roundBrief.next_safe_action: Continue read-only discovery before human clarification.
roundBrief.summary: Target unresolved; continue bounded AI discovery.

verdict.reason: Target is unresolved, but the next step is AI discovery rather than immediate human clarification.

nextRoundContract.nextGoal: Run read-only AI discovery to identify the project target and execution channel.
nextRoundContract.inheritedBoundary: read-only; no project modification; no credential or production access

roundBrief.evidence_status: weak evidence signal(s); treat worker self-claims as untrusted
